allow: PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget OK: $\(\(winget --version\)\)" } else { "winget NOT found" })

Bash(python -c "import json;d=open\('bundle_out.js',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\);print\('ERREUR:', json.loads\(d\).get\('message',''\)[:500]\) if d.lstrip\(\).startswith\('{'\) else print\('BUNDLE OK -',len\(d\),'octets, aucune erreur'\)")
